hints.description: This company engineers and manufactures a wide range of highly engineered products and software solutions for global niche markets. Their offerings are primarily focused on three segments: engineered products, software, and diagnostics/instrumentation. CEO Brian ***** has overseen significant growth through strategic acquisitions and a focus on recurring revenue models.
hints.funFact1: The company’s origins trace back to 1936 as a small manufacturer of radio parts, demonstrating a long history of adapting to technological shifts.
hints.funFact2: Despite operating in diverse industries, the company maintains a remarkably flat organizational structure and emphasizes a decentralized, entrepreneurial culture across its various business units.
